programme.title: DAZZLING Diamonds
programme.desc: Embrace timeless elegance with enduring gems that radiate eternal beauty. Shine like the stars with jewellery that captures everlasting elegance.

programme.title: Dimplex Heating - Conquer the Cold
programme.desc: Dimplex Heating is a world leader in intelligent electric heating and cooling using renewable solutions. With Dimplex you can expect some of the most innovative and stylish home appliances.

programme.title: Odyssey Living Manchester
programme.desc: Crafted from soft high-quality fabrics. This collection delivers comfort with durability and a timeless style that blends with any dAcor. Perfect for those who value a cozy yet elegant home sanctuary.

programme.title: Indian Alexandrite Gems
programme.desc: Indian Alexandrite is characterised by the very attractive bluish green daylight colour. Alexandrite's high clarity and colour change are amongst the world's rarest and most expensive gemstones.

programme.title: Saturday Primetime Special News
programme.desc: The host collates and presents a detailed account of the latest updates and developments from different regions across the world.

programme.title: The West Asia Post
programme.desc: The host presents an in-depth analysis of the latest updates about the political and socio-economic developments of West Asia.

programme.title: Wion Pulse
programme.desc: The host shares a detailed analysis of the latest news stories from various spheres including political and socio-economic issues from across the globe.

programme.title: Wion Wideangle
programme.desc: The presenter shares insights into international socio-political issues, current events and historical facts through on-the-ground reports and footage.

programme.title: Saturday Primetime Special News
programme.desc: The host collates and presents a detailed account of the latest updates and developments from different regions across the world.

programme.title: Top Stories
programme.desc: The host presents some of the latest news stories, current affairs and developments pertaining to economics, politics and sports.

programme.title: Sunday Primetime Special News
programme.desc: The host presents a round-up of the latest social, political news and updates that are making headlines around the world for a variety of different reasons.

programme.title: Tigerland
programme.desc: Forced to become a soldier, one man struggles to remain human in the face of the Vietnam war. 2000. Germany, USA. Director: Joel Schumacher. Starring: Colin Farrell, Matthew Davis.

programme.title: Between The Temples
programme.desc: A greif-stricken cantor is in a crisis of faith when his grade-school music teacher re-enters his life. 2024. USA. Director: Nathan Silver. Starring: Jason Schwartzman, Carol Kane.

programme.title: The Dead Don't Hurt
programme.desc: During the American civil war, two lovers fight for their lives on the american frontier. 2023. USA. Director: Viggo Mortensen. Starring: Vicky Krieps, Viggo Mortensen, Solly McLeod.

programme.title: The Fallen Idol
programme.desc: While spying on a butler's affair, a boy becomes the sole witness to the death of the butler's wife. 1948. UK. Director: Carol Reed. Starring: Ralph Richardson, Michele Morgan.

programme.title: The Accidental Getaway Driver
programme.desc: Long accepts a last-minute call for a cab ride, the passengers take Long hostage at gunpoint. 2023. USA. Director: Sing J. Lee. Starring: Hiep Tran Nghia, Dustin Nguyen.

programme.title: Last Call
programme.desc: A desperate fugitive takes a family hostage with a live grenade at the turn of the millennium. 2026. Greece. Director: Sherif Francis. Starring: Orfeas Avgoustidis, Maria Nafpliotou.

programme.title: The Revenant
programme.desc: Left for dead, Hugh must use his only weapon to survive in a winter hellscape, his wit. 2015. USA, Hong Kong. Director: Alejandro Gonzalez Inarritu. Starring: Leonardo DiCaprio, Tom Hardy.

programme.title: Marie Antoinette
programme.desc: 1/5. Becoming king initially paralyses Louis, and Marie is drawn into the tussle over the choice of prime minister. 2022. France. Director: Geoffrey Enthoven. Starring: Emilia Schule.

programme.title: Marie Antoinette
programme.desc: 1/6. To salvage the royal marriage - and their nations' alliance - Antoinette's brother Joseph intervenes. 2022. France. Director: Geoffrey Enthoven. Starring: Emilia Schule.

programme.title: Marie Antoinette
programme.desc: 1/7. Antoinette is pregnant - but a pamphlet circulates depicting Chartres as the father. 2022. France. Director: Geoffrey Enthoven. Starring: Emilia Schule, Louis Cunningham.

programme.title: Marie Antoinette
programme.desc: 1/8. Louis supports the rebel colonies in America against France's old enemy, England. 2022. France. Director: Geoffrey Enthoven. Starring: Emilia Schule, Louis Cunningham.

programme.title: Godzilla Minus One
programme.desc: Plagued by guilt, a pilot seeks redeption when a monster he failed to kill returns supercharged. 2023. Japan. Director: Takashi Yamazaki. Starring: Minami Hamabe, Ryûnosuke Kamiki.

programme.title: The Dead Don't Hurt
programme.desc: During the American civil war, two lovers fight for their lives on the american frontier. 2023. USA. Director: Viggo Mortensen. Starring: Vicky Krieps, Viggo Mortensen, Solly McLeod.

programme.title: The Fallen Idol
programme.desc: While spying on a butler's affair, a boy becomes the sole witness to the death of the butler's wife. 1948. UK. Director: Carol Reed. Starring: Ralph Richardson, Michele Morgan.

programme.title: The Accidental Getaway Driver
programme.desc: Long accepts a last-minute call for a cab ride, the passengers take Long hostage at gunpoint. 2023. USA. Director: Sing J. Lee. Starring: Hiep Tran Nghia, Dustin Nguyen.

programme.title: Last Call
programme.desc: A desperate fugitive takes a family hostage with a live grenade at the turn of the millennium. 2026. Greece. Director: Sherif Francis. Starring: Orfeas Avgoustidis, Maria Nafpliotou.

programme.title: The Revenant
programme.desc: Left for dead, Hugh must use his only weapon to survive in a winter hellscape, his wit. 2015. USA, Hong Kong. Director: Alejandro Gonzalez Inarritu. Starring: Leonardo DiCaprio, Tom Hardy.

programme.title: High And Low: John Galliano
programme.desc: Examine the rapid rise and fall from grace, and journey forward for controversial fashion designer John Galliano. 2023. USA. Director: Kevin Macdonald.

programme.title: This Is Not A Murder Mystery
programme.desc: 1/4. New guests arrive, bringing no manners and more stress. 2025. Belgium. Directors: Hans Herbots, Matthias Lebeer. Starring: Pierre Gervais, Stephen Tompkinson.

programme.title: This Is Not A Murder Mystery
programme.desc: 1/5. Another disappearance raises tensions as the countdown to the exhibition begins. 2025. Belgium. Director: Hans Herbots. Starring: Pierre Gervais, Stephen Tompkinson.

programme.title: Widows
programme.desc: The wives of four criminals are widowed after their husbands are caught in a shoot-out with police. 2018. UK, US. Director: Steve McQueen. Starring: Viola Davis, Michelle Rodriguez.

programme.title: The Black Swan
programme.desc: 1/1. Danish Lawyer with ties to the criminal underworld becomes a mole for a group of journalists. Exposing criminals with ties to the top of society. 2024. Denmark. Director: Mads Brugger.

programme.title: Obvious: AI Art Pioneers
programme.desc: Three French artists break into the art scene without touching a single paint brush, selling art completely generated by AI. 2023. France. Director: Thibaut Seve.

programme.title: The Gold
programme.desc: 1/1. Six armed men steal £26m worth of gold and set about trying to dispose of the bullion. 2023. UK. Director: Aneil Karia. Starring: Hugh Bonneville.

programme.title: The Gold
programme.desc: 1/2. A chain is set up to smelt the stolen Brink's-Mat gold and sell it back into the market. 2023. UK. Director: Lawrence Gough. Starring: Hugh Bonneville.

programme.title: The Gold
programme.desc: 1/3. Surveillance on Noye leads to more Gold Chain suspects. The police raid at Noye's ends in tragedy. 2023. UK. Director: Aneil Karia. Starring: Hugh Bonneville, Jack Lowden.

programme.title: The Doom Generation
programme.desc: Two troubled teens pick up a handsome drifter, and embark on a blood, and sex-filled adventure. 1955. France, United States. Director: Gregg Araki. Starring: James Duval, Rose McGowan.

programme.title: Copan
programme.desc: In a country torn apart by corruption, the Copan building and it's inhabitants are a beacon of everything Brazil stands for. 2025. Brazil, France. Director: Carine Wallauer.

programme.title: High And Low: John Galliano
programme.desc: Examine the rapid rise and fall from grace, and journey forward for controversial fashion designer John Galliano. 2023. USA. Director: Kevin Macdonald.

programme.title: This Is Not A Murder Mystery
programme.desc: 1/4. New guests arrive, bringing no manners and more stress. 2025. Belgium. Directors: Hans Herbots, Matthias Lebeer. Starring: Pierre Gervais, Stephen Tompkinson.

programme.title: This Is Not A Murder Mystery
programme.desc: 1/5. Another disappearance raises tensions as the countdown to the exhibition begins. 2025. Belgium. Director: Hans Herbots. Starring: Pierre Gervais, Stephen Tompkinson.

programme.title: Obvious: AI Art Pioneers
programme.desc: Three French artists break into the art scene without touching a single paint brush, selling art completely generated by AI. 2023. France. Director: Thibaut Seve.

programme.title: Widows
programme.desc: The wives of four criminals are widowed after their husbands are caught in a shoot-out with police. 2018. UK, US. Director: Steve McQueen. Starring: Viola Davis, Michelle Rodriguez.

programme.title: Copan
programme.desc: In a country torn apart by corruption, the Copan building and it's inhabitants are a beacon of everything Brazil stands for. 2025. Brazil, France. Director: Carine Wallauer.

programme.title: High And Low: John Galliano
programme.desc: Examine the rapid rise and fall from grace, and journey forward for controversial fashion designer John Galliano. 2023. USA. Director: Kevin Macdonald.

programme.title: Fwends
programme.desc: Two friends reconnect over the course of a weekend, navigating what it means to be a woman. 2025. Australia. Director: Sophie Somerville. Starring: Melissa Gan, Emmanuelle Mattana.

programme.title: Late Shift
programme.desc: A kind hearted nurse in an understaffed ward is pushed to her limits in a race against time. 2025. Switzerland, Germany. Director: Petra Biondina Volpe. Starring: Leonie Benesch, Sonja Riesen.

programme.title: Beyond
programme.desc: 1/6. Deciding to team up and put a stop to the evil, the siblings uncover a disturbing family secret. 2024. Germany. Director: Christian Alvart. Starring: Julius Gause, Lucas Gregorowicz.

programme.title: The Black Swan
programme.desc: 1/2. Amira gets intel on a major fraud involving contaminated land. Following the leads to a large contractor \"Arhus\". 2024. Denmark. Director: Mads Brugger.

programme.title: Shoshana
programme.desc: A British police officer and a Jewish woman fall in love amidst the political turmoil of 1930s Tel Aviv. 2023. UK. Director: Michael Winterbottom. Starring: Irina Starshenbaum, Harry Melling.

programme.title: The Gold
programme.desc: 1/4. Palmer learns he is wanted by the police. Noye's murder trial comes to a dramatic conclusion. 2023. UK. Director: Aneil Karia. Starring: Hugh Bonneville, Jack Lowden.

programme.title: The Gold
programme.desc: 1/5. Unwanted attention in Tenerife forces Palmer into desperate action. 2023. UK. Director: Lawrence Gough. Starring: Hugh Bonneville, Jack Lowden.

programme.title: The Gold
programme.desc: 1/6. The net tightens as Brightwell and Jennings make a shocking discovery. 2023. UK. Director: Lawrence Gough. Starring: Hugh Bonneville, Jack Lowden.

programme.title: Bax And Beyond
programme.desc: Explore Kylie Bax's meteoric rise to fame, with 13 international Vogue covers, she is New Zealand's first supermodel. 2024. New Zealand. Director: Neil Gussey.

programme.title: Fwends
programme.desc: Two friends reconnect over the course of a weekend, navigating what it means to be a woman. 2025. Australia. Director: Sophie Somerville. Starring: Melissa Gan, Emmanuelle Mattana.

programme.title: Late Shift
programme.desc: A kind hearted nurse in an understaffed ward is pushed to her limits in a race against time. 2025. Switzerland, Germany. Director: Petra Biondina Volpe. Starring: Leonie Benesch, Sonja Riesen.

programme.title: Beyond
programme.desc: 1/6. Deciding to team up and put a stop to the evil, the siblings uncover a disturbing family secret. 2024. Germany. Director: Christian Alvart. Starring: Julius Gause, Lucas Gregorowicz.

programme.title: Shoshana
programme.desc: A British police officer and a Jewish woman fall in love amidst the political turmoil of 1930s Tel Aviv. 2023. UK. Director: Michael Winterbottom. Starring: Irina Starshenbaum, Harry Melling.

programme.title: Bax And Beyond
programme.desc: Explore Kylie Bax's meteoric rise to fame, with 13 international Vogue covers, she is New Zealand's first supermodel. 2024. New Zealand. Director: Neil Gussey.

programme.title: Fwends
programme.desc: Two friends reconnect over the course of a weekend, navigating what it means to be a woman. 2025. Australia. Director: Sophie Somerville. Starring: Melissa Gan, Emmanuelle Mattana.

programme.title: Medicine
programme.desc: Two backpackers in India offer to nurse a baby while the Grandmother steps off the bus, but the bus keeps moving . 2023. NZ. Director: William McKegg. Starring: George Mason, Phoenix Connolly.

programme.title: Late Shift
programme.desc: A kind hearted nurse in an understaffed ward is pushed to her limits in a race against time. 2025. Switzerland, Germany. Director: Petra Biondina Volpe. Starring: Leonie Benesch, Sonja Riesen.

programme.title: Port Authority
programme.desc: Paul's brief encounter with Wye, a trans woman of colour, leaves him transfixed by her beauty. 2019. USA, France. Director: Danielle Lessovitz. Starring: Fionn Whitehead, Leyna Bloom.

programme.title: Niki
programme.desc: Niki de Saint Phalle arrives in Paris, escaping the strain of 1950's US to find freedom in art. 2024. France, Belgium. Director: Celine Sallette. Starring: Charlotte Le Bon, John Robinson.

programme.title: Beyond
programme.desc: 1/7. The siblings travel to Carpathians to track down the mysterious man who took Kai. 2024. Germany. Director: Adolfo J. Kolmerer. Starring: Frida Beineix, Maximilian Ehrenreich.

programme.title: Universal Language
programme.desc: Somewhere between Tehran and Winnipeg, seemingly unconnected lives intertwine in a symphony of quirk. 2024. Canada. Director: Matthew Rankin. Starring: Matthew Rankin, Pirouz Nemati.

programme.title: The Black Swan
programme.desc: 1/3. When Martin Malm's money laundring operation begins to crumble, Amira gets back in touch with a top lawyer. 2024. Denmark. Director: Mads Brugger.

programme.title: The Blind Couple From Mali
programme.desc: Blind from a young age, don't just watch, but listen to the story of two blind musicians from Mali as they enter the music industry. 2025. Canada. Director: Ryan Marley.
